phrase.text: <Don't wear|Do not wear|don't wear|do not wear> tight clothing.
<Don't touch|Do not touch|don't touch|do not touch> cold metal with bare hands.
<Don't rub|Do not rub|don't rub|do not rub> the affected area.
<Don't put|Do not put|don't put|do not put> the affected body parts into hot water.
<Don't try|Do not try|don't try|do not try> to swim to the shore, if you are more than one kilometer away from it.
<Don't give|Do not give|don't give|do not give> the patient alcohol.
